citation: Health Products Act — Section 12 (Misleading use of certification)
summary: Ads must not misuse HSA registration, GMP, or quality marks to imply unapproved benefits.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: HSA logo, GMP badge, ISO mark, or quality seal in creative. ACTION: WARN — verify mark scope matches claim. CHECK: Registration number, certificate scope, and expiry. ESCALATE IF: Mark implies therapeutic approval beyond registration class.
